mission: Scaffold the canonical runtime service skeletons for the API gateway, command API, projection worker, and notification worker with explicit runtime boundaries, typed configuration, observability hooks, and readiness-first contract seams.

services.purpose: Own ingress HTTP, auth/session edge adapters, request correlation, rate limiting, and release-aware route-to-BFF handoff without becoming a hidden truth owner.
services.truth_boundary: Ingress policy only. The gateway does not own mutation settlement, projection freshness truth, or provider delivery truth.

routes.purpose: Expose shell-facing gateway surfaces, route families, and ingress policy seams.
Expose release ring, publication watch, and route-freeze awareness hooks.

readiness_checks.name: shell_surface_contracts
readiness_checks.detail: Published gateway surface contracts load from the shared API contract package.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Fail closed to read-only ingress if route surface inventory cannot load.

readiness_checks.name: auth_edge_mode
readiness_checks.detail: Auth/session edge mode remains explicit and never implies writable authority by callback alone.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Return claim-pending or auth-read-only posture instead of promoting to full access.

readiness_checks.name: release_publication_watch
readiness_checks.detail: Publication and route-freeze awareness hooks remain wired before ingress proceeds.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Downgrade to observe-only freeze posture and require operator review.

retry_profiles.outcome: Retry inside ingress guard window and emit gateway.request.observed watch events.
Hold ingress at the edge and expose release-aware freeze status instead of forwarding.

env_contract.description: Ingress allowance before gateway rate limiting becomes active.
Controls whether auth/session edge adapters run in simulator-only, watch-only, or hybrid posture.
Controls whether route-freeze awareness is advisory or enforcement-based at ingress.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Freeze the route in claim-pending or auth-read-only posture until writable authority is re-proven for the same subject and route intent.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth.

services.purpose: Own mutation command ingress, validation, idempotency envelope reservation, route-intent hooks, mutation gates, and outbox publication seams without implementing feature logic yet.
services.truth_boundary: Command acceptance is not settlement truth. Finality requires downstream settlement, projection freshness, and external proof where contracts demand it.

routes.purpose: Reserve idempotency, validate route-intent hooks, and queue outbox publication.
Expose the mutation contract seam, settlement ladder, and outbox publication shape.

readiness_checks.name: idempotency_envelope
readiness_checks.detail: An explicit idempotency reservation seam exists before commands are accepted.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Reject command ingress rather than creating duplicate or ambiguous mutation attempts.

readiness_checks.name: route_intent_hook
readiness_checks.detail: Route-intent validation remains explicit before a command is queued.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Hold the command in validation-required posture instead of inferring caller intent.

readiness_checks.name: outbox_publication
readiness_checks.detail: Outbox publication remains a separate seam from command acceptance and settlement.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Keep the command in accepted-but-unpublished posture and surface it via readiness manifests.

retry_profiles.outcome: Retry within the bounded command window while keeping a single idempotency key in control.
Escalate to named review rather than marking the command settled.

env_contract.description: Event topic used for deferred outbox publication.
Controls whether mutation gates observe, enforce, or require named review.
Controls route-intent hook strictness at command ingress.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Freeze the route in claim-pending or auth-read-only posture until writable authority is re-proven for the same subject and route intent.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Keep enrichment fully off and rely on local matching only; do not widen patient identity confidence from incomplete or legally unapproved PDS signals.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Support-assisted correction or governed local review without changing the baseline identity contract.

services.purpose: Own event consumption, rebuild/backfill hooks, projection freshness markers, stale-read posture, and dead-letter seams for derived read models.
services.truth_boundary: Projection output is derived read state only. It never becomes the write authority and it never hides freshness or continuity debt.

routes.purpose: Accept an event-envelope placeholder, stage projection rebuild work, and expose dead-letter posture.
Expose freshness budgets, stale-read posture, continuity watch, and backfill hooks.

readiness_checks.name: projection_freshness_budget
readiness_checks.detail: Projection freshness budget exists before derived reads are exposed as current.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Shift to stale-read posture with explicit freshness markers.

readiness_checks.name: dead_letter_seam
readiness_checks.detail: Poison event and dead-letter seams exist before worker intake proceeds.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Divert poison events and preserve continuity evidence instead of silently dropping work.

readiness_checks.name: backfill_hooks
readiness_checks.detail: Rebuild and backfill hooks stay wired for later catch-up work.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Surface backfill debt explicitly rather than allowing projection drift to accumulate invisibly.

retry_profiles.outcome: Retry within the freshness budget and preserve the original event lineage.
Route the event to dead-letter review and mark affected read models stale.

env_contract.description: Maximum event count consumed per placeholder worker batch.
Freshness budget before a projection is explicitly considered stale.
Topic used for poison events and dead-letter review.
Controls whether rebuild work may be scheduled automatically or requires an operator.
Number of retry attempts before a poison event is dead-lettered.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Keep enrichment fully off and rely on local matching only; do not widen patient identity confidence from incomplete or legally unapproved PDS signals.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Support-assisted correction or governed local review without changing the baseline identity contract.

services.purpose: Own dispatch envelopes, provider adapter boundaries, settlement callbacks, controlled resend hooks, and secret-safe delivery seams without embedding live provider credentials.
services.truth_boundary: Dispatch acceptance is not delivery truth. Provider callbacks, resend policy, and settlement evidence stay explicit and can fail closed.

routes.purpose: Accept a placeholder dispatch envelope and expose provider/settlement seams.
Expose delivery settlement ladder, resend controls, and safe provider boundary posture.

readiness_checks.name: provider_secret_boundary
readiness_checks.detail: Provider credentials and webhook material remain env-ref-only and never land in fixtures or manifests.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Fail closed before any placeholder provider action is attempted.

readiness_checks.name: delivery_settlement
readiness_checks.detail: Delivery callbacks and settlement status remain separate from dispatch acceptance.
readiness_checks.failure_mode: Mark the envelope awaiting_settlement and hold resend review open.

readiness_checks.name: controlled_resend
readiness_checks.detail: Resend is an explicit hook with cooldown or named-review posture, not an automatic blind retry.

retry_profiles.outcome: Retry inside the delivery window while preserving envelope lineage and idempotency.
Escalate to settlement review or manual resend rather than inferring recovery.

env_contract.description: Maximum number of envelopes staged in one placeholder dispatch batch.
Controls whether provider adapters run in simulator, shadow, or hybrid posture.
How long the worker waits before delivery becomes explicitly settlement-pending.
Controls whether resend requires named review or a cooldown-only gate.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Withdraw seeded continuation trust and fall back to challenge-based continuation or another governed contact route when recipient or delivery truth is disputed.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Support reissue or bounded callback under the same grant lineage rather than silent re-send.

dependency_profiles.degraded_mode_default: Preserve a read-only, pending-delivery, or repair-needed posture until current delivery evidence or a governed fallback settles the route.
dependency_profiles.manual_fallback_default: Use controlled resend, callback escalation, or support repair under the same authoritative communication chain.
